# Chained Assignment

Chained assignment operations

```perl
$a = $b = $c = $value;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Chained Assignment

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$a = $b = $c = $value;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$a = $b = $c = $value;
```
